comment.body:
For today: as I said, i don't see this a good environment to go longer-term trades, only intraday trades and vol trades. Spot decay is in effect inot March opex, but no edge on longer-term positions.
As you know, I hold a put position I took as hedge at wednesday and thrusday last week into March Opex, but I prefer intraday edge.
